case_title: PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BELAL AYUBZAI ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-24-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-27-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-01-2015
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 15159014) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 15138110) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-24-2015 CONTINUED TO AUG-26-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15265045) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF FACTS (TRANSACTION ID # 15265045) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL $2,816.98 PRINCIPAL, $284.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,100.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO](TRANSACTION ID # 15095035), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED MAR-15-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 15181043) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 15218051), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED AUG-01-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL
DECLARATION RE CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 15265045) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
CERTIFY COPY OF JUDGMENT FACT RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT TO DMV FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESSIVE DIRECT INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-26-2015 CONTINUED TO NOV-25-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 15265045) AS TO DEFENDANT AYUBZAI, BELAL

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-25-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
